source: plain-language bug report (activation drift undetected + un-healed, observed on the owner's machine 2026-07-18..19)

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A - no UI surface; logic bug in a stdlib-python plugin repo (installer CLI + SessionStart hook)
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: the local machine is the live dev environment; the sandboxed end-to-end CLI subprocess tests (--base-dir/--settings-path/CT6_GATEWAY_HOME) are the live integration tests; the REAL gateway + settings.json are read-only

entries.spec_requirement_id: gateway-activation-integrity/Activation drift is detected and named on the status surface (ADDED)
acceptance_criteria: new unit test pins the clean not-activated surface unchanged (no drift text)
new unit tests pin the explicit activation_drift field in the --json payload + token-only half-drift detection

entries.spec_requirement_id: gateway-activation-integrity/The install carry-forward path verifies activation and heals drift from recorded consent (ADDED)
scenarios: drifted carry-forward heals and says so
unhealable drift is a fail row, never green
a corrupt settings.json is never auto-overwritten
acceptance_criteria: new unit tests pin the verified-wording, healed, and unhealable fail-row paths
setup_entry display prints carried-forward only on the verified path
new unit tests pin the served-port (args.port) verification + the corrupt-settings abort fail row

scenarios: the observed drift shape self-heals at session start
a customized base URL is never clobbered
a dead gateway is never wired in
acceptance_criteria: new unit tests pin the guards: installed-copy, custom-BASE_URL preserved, fail-open, merge-preservation
new unit tests pin the explicit-injection bypass + the dead-port no-op (injected port_probe)
new unit tests pin the half-drift token completion + the main() heal order (activation before split)

entries.spec_requirement_id: gateway-activation-integrity/The test suite can never mutate real machine state (ADDED)
scenarios: a settings-path-less invocation lands in the sentinel
the tripwire converts a leak into a named failure
acceptance_criteria: autouse sentinel redirect fixture active for the whole gateway test module + probe regression test proving absorption (sentinel pre-seeded with the port-4000 env block; assert-sentinel-active BEFORE the invocation)
_scrub_signals points CT6_GATEWAY_HOME at a per-test tmp sentinel instead of deleting it (g1)
session tripwire in tests/conftest.py snapshots settings.json + gateway.json + gateway.env + key-declines.json, fails loud with the concurrent-writer triage hint (g2/g4)
